name: caddy_reverse_proxy_upstreams_healthy
definition: Health status of each reverse proxy upstream; 1=healthy/reachable 0=unhealthy/failing health checks
absence_means: Caddy has no reverse_proxy configured — gate this section; or all upstreams are healthy
cardinality_footguns: Low cardinality per upstream address; upstream count bounded by config

name: caddy_http_request_errors_total
definition: Total count of requests that encountered a middleware error (internal handler failures — not HTTP 4xx/5xx status codes)
absence_means: No middleware errors — normal healthy state; absence of handler labels means no errors have been recorded
cardinality_footguns: Cardinality = server × handler; keep handler group-by limited

name: caddy_http_request_duration_seconds_count
definition: Total HTTP requests processed — the count dimension of the caddy_http_request_duration_seconds histogram; primary request rate signal
absence_means: No HTTP traffic flowing; check caddy_build_info and upstream routing
cardinality_footguns: High cardinality: server × handler × code × method — filter or group by one dimension at a time

name: caddy_admin_http_requests_total
definition: Total requests to the Caddy admin API (config reload path /config /id etc.); reflects operator/CI activity not user traffic
absence_means: Caddy admin API not being accessed — normal during stable periods; check if scrape endpoint is the admin port
cardinality_footguns: Medium cardinality: handler × method × path × statuscode; path can be high-cardinality with dynamic config IDs

name: caddy_http_request_duration_seconds
definition: Histogram of full round-trip request durations from connection accept to response complete (includes TLS + backend latency for reverse proxy)
absence_means: No HTTP traffic; histogram exists but no observations
cardinality_footguns: High cardinality across server × handler × code × method; use server+handler group-by for latency percentiles

name: caddy_http_response_duration_seconds
definition: Histogram of time-to-first-byte (TTFB) — time from request receipt to first byte sent to client; useful proxy for backend responsiveness under reverse_proxy
absence_means: No HTTP responses served; or Caddy version < 2.5 (metric not present)
cardinality_footguns: Same cardinality risk as request_duration — filter to reverse_proxy handler for backend latency signal

name: caddy_http_requests_in_flight
definition: Current number of requests being handled across all active connections; a gauge snapshot not a rate
absence_means: No active HTTP requests — Caddy idle or not receiving traffic
cardinality_footguns: Cardinality = server × handler; reasonable if handler set is bounded

name: caddy_http_request_size_bytes
definition: Histogram of total request size (headers + body) per handled request; high values indicate large payload uploads
cardinality_footguns: Same high cardinality as request_duration — group by server+handler only

name: caddy_http_response_size_bytes
definition: Histogram of total response size (headers + body) per handled request; high values indicate large responses to clients

name: go_goroutines
definition: Number of goroutines currently running in the Caddy Go runtime; sustained increase indicates goroutine leak
absence_means: Caddy process metric missing; expect 20-100 at steady state

name: go_memstats_heap_alloc_bytes
definition: Current heap memory allocated and in use by the Caddy Go runtime

name: go_memstats_heap_sys_bytes
definition: Total heap memory obtained from the OS by the Caddy Go runtime; denominator for heap utilization %

name: process_resident_memory_bytes
definition: Resident set size (RSS) memory used by the Caddy process; includes all in-use memory pages
absence_means: Caddy process metric missing; expected 50-200MB for light-medium load

name: process_cpu_seconds_total
definition: Total CPU time consumed by the Caddy process (cumulative counter); use .cumulativetodelta variant or rate function
absence_means: Caddy process metric missing; confirmed cumulative (not delta)

name: promhttp_metric_handler_requests_total
definition: Total scrape requests to the Caddy /metrics endpoint by HTTP status code; 200=success 500/503=error
absence_means: Caddy is not being scraped; check OTel collector Prometheus receiver config

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: Caddy does not expose cost-related metrics. Cost proxies: caddy_http_request_duration_seconds_count (request volume as billing proxy) and caddy_http_response_size_bytes_sum (egress bandwidth proxy).
